name: volcanic_soil
title: Volcanic Soil
short_description: Super-fertile volcanic soil with growth boosts and harvest-based fertility decay.
long_description:
Volcanic Soil adds a high-fertility soil path for farming progression.

Key features:
- Natural and tilled volcanic soil states.
- Tilled volcanic soil boosts crop growth with extra growth ticks.
- Both natural and tilled volcanic soil accelerate sapling growth attempts.
- Fertility decays on mature harvests and eventually degrades to normal soil.
- Remaining fertility cycles persist when tilled soil is dug and replaced.
- Fertility cycles and both growth intervals are configurable.

Acquisition paths:
- Smelt compressed cobble for an early-game route.
- Use Lava Crucible processing for an advanced route with bonus resources.

Compatibility:
- Required: moreblocks, ore_dust
- Optional: farming, x_farming
